3.text: I, Michael Hwang, of the Dubai International FinancialChief Justice (/glossary/chief-justice/) Centre , Courts (/glossary/court/)

15.text: Part 53 of the of the DIFC CourtsRules (/glossary/rules/)

17.text: A.The DIFC Courts Law authorises the Chief Justice of the DIFC Courts, where he considers it appropriate, to set up and administer Tribunals of the DIFC Courts, and to authorise for their administration, including the appointment of its members, which shallrules (/glossary/rules/) be set out in the Rules of (Article 14(3)). Court (/glossary/court/)

18.text: B. The SCT was established pursuant to DIFC Courts Order No. 2 of 2007 issued by the then Chief Justice, Sir Anthony Evans. C. The Rules of the DIFC Courts (the “RDC”) contain at Part 53 the rules relating to the SCT; and D. The SCT is recognised as a mechanism for the prompt and cost-effi cient hearing and determination of smaller claims within the of the DIFC Courts. jurisdiction (/glossary/jurisdiction/)

19.text: Now I hereby order and direct as follows: –

20.text: 1.Hayley Norton shall be appointed as an additional member of the SCT; and 2. This Order shall take effect from the date of signature. Order No. 2 of 2007 shall remain in full force and effect save as amended by this Order. This Order shall be known as The DIFC Small Claims Tribunal – Additional Members of the SCT Order No. 1 of 2018.

21.text: Michael Hwang Chief Justice of the DIFC Courts Issued: 18 June 2018
